disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Forceful blunt trauma to the right chest (kicked by a horse) about 2 hours ago
trigger_question_examples: What happened — how was he injured?
When did this start and what caused it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: A horse kicked him really hard in the right side of the chest about two hours ago.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe worsening breathlessness with pain that spikes on inspiration on the injured side
trigger_question_examples: Does it hurt more when he breathes in?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He can barely breathe and it's got much worse — every breath in is agony on the right side.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive pallor, cold clammy skin, dizziness and near-fainting on sitting up (proxy for circulatory collapse)
trigger_question_examples: What colour is his skin — is he pale or sweaty?
Does he feel faint or has he nearly passed out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's gone really white and cold and sweaty, and he nearly fainted when he tried to sit up — he keeps saying he's dizzy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Fluctuating alertness — drifting in and out, going quiet, only able to speak in short phrases
trigger_question_examples: Is he fully awake and talking normally?
Is he staying alert or drifting off?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He keeps drifting off and going quiet — he can only get a few words out at a time now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No large visible external blood loss despite the severe systemic collapse
trigger_question_examples: Is there a lot of visible bleeding anywhere?
Can you see any obvious wound bleeding heavily?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's no big cut or heavy bleeding I can see — that's what's scary, he looks this bad without much blood.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No medications taken and no relevant past history offered
trigger_question_examples: Any medical conditions or blood thinners?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He hasn't taken anything and he's normally healthy as far as I know.
